title: Inacaliri
summary: Inacaliri is a mountain in the Andes Mountains, situated on the border of Bolivia and Chile in the Potosí Department and in the Antofagasta Region.  It has a height of 5,618 metres (18,432 ft) and has a summit crater about 400 metres (1,312 ft) in diameter, which contains a crater lake.
text: Inacaliri is a mountain in the Andes Mountains, situated on the border of Bolivia and Chile in the Potosí Department and in the Antofagasta Region.  It has a height of 5,618 metres (18,432 ft) and has a summit crater about 400 metres (1,312 ft) in diameter, which contains a crater lake.
